name: sharonlk-marketplace
description: A marketplace of Claude Code plugins including skills, hooks, MCP servers, agents, and slash commands.

plugins.name: code-review-skill
plugins.description: A skill that performs thorough code reviews.

plugins.name: auto-commit-hook
plugins.description: Hooks that automate commit workflows on stop and post-tool-use events.

plugins.name: github-mcp
plugins.description: MCP server integration for GitHub with an accompanying skill.

plugins.name: pr-review-agent
plugins.description: An agent that reviews pull requests.

plugins.name: commit-commands
plugins.description: Slash commands for commit, push, and PR creation workflows.

plugins.name: grill-me
plugins.description: Quizzes the user on any topic with progressively harder questions and a final score.

plugins.name: superpowers
plugins.description: Activates maximum-effort mode: deep analysis, exhaustive tool use, and expert-quality output.

plugins.name: clangd-lsp
plugins.description: C/C++ language server integration using clangd for code intelligence, diagnostics, and formatting.

plugins.name: csharp-lsp
plugins.description: C# language server integration for code intelligence and diagnostics.

plugins.name: gopls-lsp
plugins.description: Go language server integration using gopls for code intelligence, refactoring, and analysis.

plugins.name: jdtls-lsp
plugins.description: Java language server integration using Eclipse JDT Language Server.

plugins.name: kotlin-lsp
plugins.description: Kotlin language server integration for code intelligence and diagnostics.

plugins.name: lua-lsp
plugins.description: Lua language server integration for code intelligence and diagnostics.

plugins.name: php-lsp
plugins.description: PHP language server integration for code intelligence and diagnostics.

plugins.name: pyright-lsp
plugins.description: Python type-checking and language server integration using Pyright.

plugins.name: ruby-lsp
plugins.description: Ruby language server integration for code intelligence and diagnostics.

plugins.name: rust-analyzer-lsp
plugins.description: Rust language server integration using rust-analyzer for code intelligence and type checking.

plugins.name: swift-lsp
plugins.description: Swift language server integration for code intelligence and diagnostics.

plugins.name: typescript-lsp
plugins.description: TypeScript language server integration for type checking and code intelligence.

plugins.name: frontend-design
plugins.description: Frontend design skill for generating distinctive, production-grade UI/UX implementations.

plugins.name: session-report
plugins.description: Generate a structured HTML session report summarizing Claude's work during the session.

plugins.name: claude-code-setup
plugins.description: Analyze codebases and recommend tailored Claude Code automations such as hooks, skills, MCP servers, and subagents.

plugins.name: skill-creator
plugins.description: Create new skills, improve existing skills, and measure skill performance with evals.

plugins.name: math-olympiad
plugins.description: Solve competition math (IMO, Putnam, USAMO) with adversarial verification that catches what self-verification misses.

plugins.name: playground
plugins.description: Creates interactive HTML playgrounds — self-contained single-file explorers with visual controls and live preview.

plugins.name: mcp-server-dev
plugins.description: Skills for designing and building MCP servers that work seamlessly with Claude.

plugins.name: code-review
plugins.description: Automated code review for pull requests using multiple specialized agents with confidence-based scoring.

plugins.name: mcp-tunnels
plugins.description: Connect Claude to a private MCP server through an Anthropic MCP tunnel using Docker Compose.

plugins.name: security-guidance
plugins.description: Security review for Claude-generated code with pattern-based warnings, LLM diff review, and agentic commit reviewer.

plugins.name: explanatory-output-style
plugins.description: Adds educational insights about implementation choices and codebase patterns via a SessionStart hook.

plugins.name: learning-output-style
plugins.description: Interactive learning mode that requests meaningful code contributions at decision points via a SessionStart hook.

plugins.name: ralph-loop
plugins.description: Continuous self-referential AI loops for interactive iterative development using the Ralph Wiggum technique.

plugins.name: cwc-makers
plugins.description: Seamless onboarding for the Code-with-Claude Makers Cardputer: flash firmware and install the Claude Buddy app bundle.

plugins.name: claude-md-management
plugins.description: Tools to maintain and improve CLAUDE.md files — audit quality, capture session learnings, and keep project memory current.

plugins.name: feature-dev
plugins.description: Comprehensive feature development workflow with specialized agents for codebase exploration, architecture design, and quality review.

plugins.name: code-modernization
plugins.description: Modernize legacy codebases (COBOL, legacy Java/C++, monolith web apps) with a structured assess → transform → harden workflow.

plugins.name: agent-sdk-dev
plugins.description: Create and verify Claude Agent SDK applications in Python and TypeScript.

plugins.name: plugin-dev
plugins.description: Plugin development toolkit with skills for creating agents, commands, hooks, MCP integrations, and plugin structure guidance.

plugins.name: pr-review-toolkit
plugins.description: Comprehensive PR review agents specializing in comments, tests, error handling, type design, code quality, and simplification.

plugins.name: hookify
plugins.description: Easily create and manage hooks to prevent unwanted behaviors by analyzing conversation patterns.

plugins.name: code-simplifier
plugins.description: Agent that simplifies and refines code for clarity, consistency, and maintainability while preserving functionality.

plugins.name: example-plugin
plugins.description: A comprehensive example plugin demonstrating all Claude Code extension options: commands, agents, skills, hooks, and MCP servers.
